'''Viamarr 4''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Viamarr system/Legends|Viamarr system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] was [[Velery]]. [[Viamarr Blackroot]] [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]] was grown in the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] subterranean [[Cave/Legends|caves]].

==History==
In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], during the early stages of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Hunt for Zsinj|campaign]] against [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], the planet was one of the many stops made by [[Wraith Squadron]] after their capture of the modified [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']]. During that time, the planet was ruled by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Watesk]] and in the process of pledging its loyalty to Zsinj. As of 7 ABY, Viamarr 4 maintained a small air force, [[Blackwing Flight]], consisting of outdated [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
